title: Troubleshooting Topology Management — Check the device plugin resource API
text:
The kubelet provides a
PodResourceLister
gRPC service to enable discovery of resources and associated metadata.
By using its
List gRPC endpoint
,
information about reserved memory for each container can be retrieved, which is contained
in protobuf
ContainerMemory
message.
This information can be retrieved solely for pods in Guaranteed QoS class.
